title: German Leaders Clash With Spy Chiefs Over Domestic Threat From Iran
summary_full: Intelligence agents have privately warned of the potential of hybrid attacks from Iran-linked groups. But political leaders, including Chancellor Friedrich Merz, have publicly played down the risk.
summary_public: Intelligence agents have privately warned of the potential of hybrid attacks from Iran-linked groups. But political leaders, including Chancellor Friedrich Merz, have publicly played down the risk.

DE.label: negative
DE.evidence: potential of hybrid attacks from Iran-linked groups
